attributes.description: Adds a clear button when the combobox is not empty.
attributes.name: clearable

attributes.description:
The delimiter to use when setting the value when `multiple` is enabled.
The default is a space ' ', but you can set it to a comma or other character(s).
attributes.name: delimiter

attributes.description: Disables the combobox control.
attributes.name: disabled

attributes.description:
A function used to filter options in the combobox component.
The default filter method is a case- and diacritic-insensitive string comparison.
attributes.name: filter

attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element.
This attribute allows you to place the form control outside of a form and associate it
with the form that has this `id`.
The form must be in the same document or shadow root for this to work.
attributes.name: form

attributes.description:
A function that customizes the rendered option. The first argument is the option, the second
is the query string, which is typed into the combobox.
The function should return either a Lit TemplateResult or a string containing trusted HTML
to render in the shown list of filtered options.
If the query string should be highlighted use the `highlightOptionRenderer` function.
attributes.name: getOption

attributes.description:
A function that customizes the tags to be rendered when `multiple` is true. The first argument is the option, the second
is the current tag's index.  The function should return either a Lit TemplateResult or a string containing trusted HTML of the symbol to render at
the specified value.
attributes.name: getTag
attributes.type: (option: SynOption, index: number) => TemplateResult | string | HTMLElement

attributes.description: The combobox's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.
attributes.name: help-text

attributes.description: The combobox's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.
attributes.name: label

attributes.description:
The maximum number of selected options to show when `multiple` is true. After the maximum, "+n" will be shown to
indicate the number of additional items that are selected. Set to 0 to remove the limit.
attributes.name: max-options-visible

attributes.description: The maximum length of input that will be considered valid.
attributes.name: maxlength

attributes.description:
Allows more than one option to be selected.
If `multiple` is set, the combobox will always be `restricted` to the available options
attributes.name: multiple

attributes.description: The name of the combobox, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.
attributes.name: name

attributes.description:
Indicates whether or not the combobox is open.
You can toggle this attribute to show and hide the listbox, or you can use the `show()`
and `hide()` methods and this attribute will reflect the combobox's open state.
attributes.name: open

attributes.description: Placeholder text to show as a hint when the combobox is empty.
attributes.name: placeholder

attributes.description:
The preferred placement of the combobox's menu.
Note that the actual placement may vary as needed to keep the listbox inside of the viewport.
attributes.name: placement

attributes.description: Sets the combobox to a readonly state.
attributes.name: readonly

attributes.description: The combobox's required attribute.
attributes.name: required

attributes.description:
When set to `true`, restricts the combobox to only allow selection from the available options.
Users will not be able to enter custom values that are not present in the list.
This will always be true, if `multiple` is active.
attributes.name: restricted

attributes.description: The combobox's size.
attributes.name: size

attributes.description:
The current value of the combobox, submitted as a name/value pair with form data. When `multiple` is enabled, the
value attribute will be a list of values  separated by the delimiter, based on the options selected, and the value property will
be an array. **For this reason, values must not contain the delimiter character.**
attributes.name: value

cssParts.description: The clear button.
cssParts.name: clear-button

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the prefix, combobox, clear icon, and expand button.
cssParts.name: combobox

cssParts.description: The element that displays the selected option's label, an `<input>` element.
cssParts.name: display-input

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the expand icon.
cssParts.name: expand-icon

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the filtered options.
cssParts.name: filtered-listbox

cssParts.description: The form control that wraps the label, combobox, and help text.
cssParts.name: form-control

cssParts.description: The help text's wrapper.
cssParts.name: form-control-help-text

cssParts.description: The combobox's wrapper.
cssParts.name: form-control-input

cssParts.description: The label's wrapper.
cssParts.name: form-control-label

cssParts.description: The listbox container where the options are slotted and the filtered options list exists.
cssParts.name: listbox

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the "no results" message.
cssParts.name: no-results

cssParts.description: The popup's exported `popup` part. Use this to target the tooltip's popup container.
cssParts.name: popup

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the prefix slot.
cssParts.name: prefix

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the suffix slot.
cssParts.name: suffix

cssParts.description: The individual tags that represent each selected option in `multiple`.
cssParts.name: tag

cssParts.description: The tag's base part.
cssParts.name: tag__base

cssParts.description: The tag's content part.
cssParts.name: tag__content

cssParts.description: The tag's remove button.
cssParts.name: tag__remove-button

cssParts.description: The tag's remove button base part.
cssParts.name: tag__remove-button__base

cssParts.description: The container that houses option tags when `multiple` is used.
cssParts.name: tags

events.description: Emitted after the combobox's menu closes and all animations are complete.
events.name: syn-after-hide

events.description: Emitted after the combobox's menu opens and all animations are complete.
events.name: syn-after-show

events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus.
events.name: syn-blur

events.description: Emitted when the control's value changes.
events.name: syn-change

events.description: Emitted when the control's value is cleared.
events.name: syn-clear

events.description: Emitted when the combobox menu fails to open.
events.name: syn-error

events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus.
events.name: syn-focus

events.description: Emitted when the combobox's menu closes.
events.name: syn-hide

events.description: Emitted when the control receives input.
events.name: syn-input

events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.
events.name: syn-invalid

events.description: Emitted when the combobox's menu opens.
events.name: syn-show

methods.description:
Checks for validity but does not show a validation message.
Returns `true` when valid and `false` when invalid.
methods.name: checkValidity

methods.description: Gets the associated form, if one exists.
methods.name: getForm

methods.description: Checks for validity and shows the browser's validation message if the control is invalid.
methods.name: reportValidity

methods.description: Sets a custom validation message. Pass an empty string to restore validity.
methods.name: setCustomValidity

methods.description:
Shows the listbox. If it is not possible to open the listbox, because there are no
appropriate filtered options, a syn-error is emitted and the listbox stays closed.
methods.name: show

Allows more than one option to be selected.
If `multiple` is set, the combobox will always be `restricted` to the available options

Indicates whether or not the combobox is open.

The preferred placement of the combobox's menu.

When set to `true`, restricts the combobox to only allow selection from the available options.

The current value of the combobox, submitted as a name/value pair with form data. When `multiple` is enabled, the

slots.description: The listbox options. Must be `<syn-option>` elements. You can use `<syn-optgroup>`'s to group items visually.
The combobox's label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.
slots.name: label

slots.description: Used to prepend a presentational icon or similar element to the combobox.
slots.name: prefix

slots.description: Used to append a presentational icon or similar element to the combobox.
slots.name: suffix

slots.description: An icon to use in lieu of the default clear icon.
slots.name: clear-icon

slots.description: The icon to show when the control is expanded and collapsed. Rotates on open and close.
slots.name: expand-icon

slots.description: Text that describes how to use the combobox. Alternatively, you can use the `help-text` attribute.
slots.name: help-text

summary:
A combobox component that combines the functionality of a text input with a dropdown listbox,
allowing users to either select from predefined options or enter custom values (when not restricted).
